_comment: MCP manifest for corpus-crawl + corpus-findings non-interactive claude -p calls. Two servers wired in: wick (residential-IP web fetcher with browser-grade rendering, used as a fallback when our direct net/http download misses or returns thin content) and circumvention-corpus (the corpus's own MCP, lets the classifier and findings extractor dedupe against existing records and look up taxonomy IDs without us shoving the whole vocabulary into every prompt).
